channel.title: Contextus on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Contextus on CEDIS

item.title: Contextus software registration is granted by INPI
item.description: The Contextus certificate was issued on February 18, 2026, formalizing the software's legal protection before INPI.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Conference by Sergio Antônio Andrade de Freitas, André Corrêa da Silva, Milena de Faria Silva, Renan Carneiro Batista, Washington Luís Ribeiro de Carvalho Segundo (2026).

item.title: Publications
item.description: Computer program registration granted by INPI under process BR512026000889-1, with the certificate issued on February 18, 2026.
